answer: When you ask for URLs in your prompt, the language model will attempt to generate them based on patterns it has seen, but these will not be the actual URLs that were searched. Always use the search_results field for accurate source information.

You should include explicit instructions in your prompts for the model to clearly state when information isn’t available rather than providing speculative information, set clear boundaries about only using publicly available sources, and instruct the model to acknowledge when it cannot find information instead of guessing.
